song.title: Since the Day I Met the Lord
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C
song.lyrics: [V1] .G C Since the day I met the Lord I’ve not been the same . Am D For Jesus put His seal on me. . G C I heard His word, I trusted Him, I called on His name . Am D And I was sealed for all eternity! [C] .G C Something inside just won’t let me forget Him. .D C G Something inside just keeps turning my heart to Him. . C Something got a hold of me the day that I met Him. . G C Something’s changed in me, . G I’ll never be the same! [V2] Something I thought that I might go back again To the life that I was living before. But every time I found that I just couldn’t go back I wasn’t the same anymore! [V3] Nothing I could ever do could make me this way- I didn’t want to be at the start. But Hallelujah! Jesus got His life into me And put His own stamp on my heart!
